spec.description: Windows Exporter Dashboard Created By Ismaeil Rasoulivand with love

spec.expr: (sum(windows_logical_disk_size_bytes{volume!~"Harddisk.*", instance="$server"}) by (instance) - sum(windows_logical_disk_free_bytes{volume!~"Harddisk.*", instance="$server"}) by (instance)) / sum(windows_logical_disk_size_bytes{volume!~"Harddisk.*", instance="$server"}) by (instance) * 100

spec.title: Windows Exporter Copy
